# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function add: int (a: int, b: int)
  entry:
      LOAD t1, [a]
      LOAD t2, [b]
      t3 = ADD t1, t2
      RETURN t3

function mul: int (a: int, b: int)
  entry:
      LOAD t4, [a]
      LOAD t5, [b]
      t6 = MUL t4, t5
      RETURN t6

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t7 = CALL [add], 5, 3
      STORE t7, [x]
      LOAD t8, [x]
      t9 = CALL [mul], t8, 2
      STORE t9, [y]
      LOAD t10, [y]
      RETURN t10
